questions.question: Explain the difference between mean and median, and when you would use each.
keyPoints: Mean is the arithmetic average, median is the middle value
Mean is sensitive to outliers, median is robust
Use mean for normally distributed data
Use median for skewed data or data with outliers

questions.question: Describe the process of univariate analysis and its importance in machine learning.
keyPoints: Measures of central tendency and their calculation
Measures of dispersion and their interpretation
Importance for feature understanding and preprocessing in ML
